ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Vendor's website URL */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the vendor */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for vendor support */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for vendor support */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the vendor is based */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vendor is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "number_of_ports" TEXT /* Number of ports on the front */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth for front ports */,
  "full_duplex" INTEGER /* Whether the ports support full duplex */,
  "support_costs" TEXT /* Whether support costs are included or optional */,
  "form_factor" TEXT /* Physical form factor of the model */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Physical dimensions */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the model in kilograms */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "operating_temperature" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications and compliance */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "priced_from" TEXT /* Vendor or reseller from which the price is quoted */,
  "street_price" REAL /* Street price of the model */,
  "cost_per_gigabit" REAL /* Cost per gigabit of bandwidth */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is quoted */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the street price */,
  "vat" REAL /* Value-added tax percentage */,
  "pricing_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "is_promotional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the price is part of a promotional offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., IT Manager, Procurement Officer, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, compare) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
